paragraph: The single-family market in Ridgewood is firing on all cylinders. With 121 homes sold over eight months at a median of $1,365,000, you're looking at real seller's market dynamics. Homes are selling 8.1 percent above asking on average, 76.9 percent of them above list price, and the median time on market sits at 12 days. Many multiple offer situations are happening here, and sellers are dictating terms. The price range runs wide, from $620,000 to $4,750,000, so Ridgewood has entry points across the spectrum, but anything priced right moves fast. Multi-family properties are sparse with only five sales at a median of $1,280,000, and they're also moving above asking at a similar clip. Condos and townhouses round out the market at the lower end with a median of $614,500 and four sales, posting strong sale-to-list ratios and tight days on market as well. If you're shopping in Ridgewood, the competitive heat is real across the board, but the single-family market is where the volume and the momentum are concentrated.
